project.name: DailyEng
project.description: AI-powered English & Japanese Learning Platform with vocabulary, grammar, and speaking practice. Features FSRS spaced repetition, AI roleplays with Gemini, Azure Speech integration, gamification, and 3D visuals.

layers.name: Frontend Pages & Routes
layers.description: Next.js App Router pages, layouts, and route handlers that define the application URL structure

layers.name: Frontend UI Components
layers.description: Reusable React components for the user interface including dashboard, speaking, auth, and shared UI elements

layers.name: Frontend Hooks & State
layers.description: Custom React hooks, Zustand stores, and context providers for state management and business logic

layers.name: Frontend Server Actions
layers.description: Next.js server actions that handle API communication between frontend and Spring Boot backend

layers.name: Frontend Utilities & Types
layers.description: TypeScript type definitions, utility functions, API client, and shared helpers

layers.name: Backend REST API
layers.description: Spring Boot REST controllers that define API endpoints for auth, vocabulary, grammar, speaking, study plans, and more

layers.name: Backend Service Layer
layers.description: Spring services containing business logic including AI integrations (Gemini, Azure Speech), SRS algorithm, and XP system

layers.name: Backend Data Layer
layers.description: JPA entities, Spring Data repositories, DTOs, and data transfer objects for PostgreSQL database access

layers.name: Backend Security & Auth
layers.description: JWT authentication, security filters, OAuth2 providers, and Spring Security configuration

layers.name: Backend Configuration
layers.description: Spring Boot configuration classes, application properties, database config, CORS, and data seeders

layers.name: Backend AI & External Services
layers.description: Integration with Google Gemini AI, Azure Speech Services (TTS/STT), Pexels API, and other external services

layers.name: Testing
layers.description: Unit tests, integration tests, and test utilities for both frontend (Vitest) and backend (JUnit)

layers.name: Frontend Data & Locales
layers.description: Static data files, locale/internationalization configs, mock data, and generated data connectors

tour.title: Application Entry Points
tour.description: Start with the Next.js App Router entry point and the Spring Boot main application class. These are the two processes that run the platform.

tour.title: Authentication & Security
tour.description: Understand how users authenticate via JWT cookies and Google OAuth. The auth flow spans frontend context providers, server actions, and Spring Security filters.

tour.title: AI Integration (Gemini & Azure Speech)
tour.description: The core differentiator — AI services for generating learning content, assessing pronunciation, and text-to-speech. Gemini powers content generation, Azure handles speech.

tour.title: Speaking Practice System
tour.description: Multi-turn conversational speaking sessions with real-time speech-to-text, pronunciation assessment, and AI-powered feedback. This is the most complex feature.

tour.title: Vocabulary & SRS (Spaced Repetition)
tour.description: Vocabulary management with FSRS algorithm for optimal retention scheduling. Includes flashcards, dictionary lookups, and personalized review scheduling.

tour.title: Grammar & Content System
tour.description: Grammar lesson management, content delivery with CMS-like SiteContent storage, and AI-generated examples.

tour.title: Study Plans & Gamification
tour.description: Personalized daily study plans, placement testing, XP system, streaks, and progress analytics that keep learners engaged.

tour.title: Dashboard & User Experience
tour.description: The main dashboard showing daily tasks, XP progress, study streaks, and quick access to all learning modules. Built with Radix UI and Framer Motion.

tour.title: Data Access & Database
tour.description: Spring Data JPA repositories with PostgreSQL. Database schema managed by Flyway migrations. JSONB columns for flexible content storage.

tour.title: Frontend State & Server Actions
tour.description: Zustand stores for client state, Next.js server actions for API communication, and React context providers for auth and theme.
